$comment: Registry of agents featured in the showcase gallery. The gateway serves this (minus internal `port`/`backendDir`) at GET /agents; the static UI renders one card per entry and opens a chat against /agents/<id>/. `sourcePath` links back to the template that powers each agent. `agentName` mirrors AGENT_NAME in templates/<id>/src/agent.py (informational). `backendDir` must contain bridge_app.py/hosted_client.py/hosted_proxy.py ONLY -- the gateway runs no template runtime, it forwards every turn to the REAL Foundry hosted agent deployed via templates/<id>/hosted/ (or showcase/agents/<id>/). `hostedAgentName` is the deployed Foundry agent's id (HOSTED_AGENT_NAME); defaults to `id` when omitted.

agents.title: Agentic Assistant (HITL)
agents.tagline: The canonical stack: read freely, but every consequential action pauses for your approval.
agents.description: A minimal but complete CopilotKit + AG-UI + Foundry hosted-agent app. It can read a value and apply a delta — and any change pauses on a human-in-the-loop approval card before it executes.

tools.name: apply_delta
tools.description: Change the value by a delta

agents.title: Conversational Banking (HITL)
agents.tagline: Check balances and activity freely — every money movement pauses for approval.
agents.description: A banking assistant that answers balance and transaction questions instantly, but routes transfers and bill payments through an Approve / Reject gate before any money moves.

agents.title: Health Claim Intake (HITL)
agents.tagline: Auto-fill a claim from documents, review, then submit behind an approval gate.
agents.description: Intake multiple claim documents, auto-fill the claim form, let the user review and edit, then submit to the insurer behind a human-in-the-loop approval gate.

tools.name: update_claim_field
tools.description: Correct a field on the claim

tools.name: submit_claim
tools.description: Submit the claim to the insurer

agents.title: Copilot PR Assistant (HITL)
agents.tagline: GitHub Copilot drafts a pull request — opening it pauses for your approval.
agents.description: Powered by the GitHub Copilot SDK (not Microsoft Agent Framework): Copilot reviews the changed files, drafts a PR title and body, and the open_pull_request action pauses on a human-in-the-loop approval card before it executes. Same AG-UI architecture, different engine — deployed the same way, as a real Foundry hosted agent behind the same thin bridge.
tryPrompts: Review the changes and open a pull request

tools.name: list_changed_files
tools.description: List files changed on the branch

tools.name: get_file_diff
tools.description: Show the diff for a file
